pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target levels from Java 8 to Java 11 to support the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 features if source/target levels remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) dependencies for modern testing support.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (e.g., org.junit.Test) are no longer available; tests using JUnit 5 annotations will fail to compile or run without the new dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Javadoc plugin configuration to handle Java 11 documentation generation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Javadoc generation may fail on Java 11 with older plugin versions due to stricter checks or API changes.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Migrate test framework from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter).
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations and assertions are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them with JUnit 5 engine results in tests being ignored or compilation errors if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.
JUnit 5 does not support the timeout attribute on the @Test annotation; it requires the separate @Timeout annotation.
JUnit 5 does not support the expected attribute on the @Test annotation; exceptions must be asserted explicitly using Assertions.assertThrows.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertions with JUnit 5 Assertions class.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is not available in JUnit 5; assertions must be performed via org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 @BeforeEach lifecycle method for test setup.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: JUnit 5 uses @BeforeEach instead of JUnit 4's @Before for setup methods.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Remove Jedis client dependency from tests.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: The Jedis client library is no longer included in the test classpath, causing compilation errors if referenced.
The code references 'log' which is generated by Lombok; without the annotation and Lombok processor, the code fails to compile.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add Apache Commons Lang dependency for RandomUtils.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: The code uses RandomUtils.nextInt which is part of Apache Commons Lang; without the dependency, it fails to compile.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add Guava Resources dependency for resource loading.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: The code uses com.google.common.io.Resources; without the Guava dependency, it fails to compile.

src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.general_idea: Add internal utility imports for Redis server configuration.
src/test/java/redis/embedded/RedisServer.why_exists: The code references internal classes like CommonConstant, Architecture, OS, and TimeTool; these must be imported to compile.
